hero.desc: Just rested, fresh, and like you. At Nexus Clinic, we treat the real cause first, then choose the safest option for your under-eye area.
hero.check1: If it looks brown and stays brown - pigment likely
hero.check2: If it looks blue/purple - vessels and thin skin
hero.check3: If worse under lights - hollows and shadowing
hero.check4: If puffy in morning - fluid retention

types.title: What are dark eye circles, really?
types.desc: "Dark circles" is not one problem. It's a label for several different under-eye issues.

treatments.title: Treatment options, tailored to you
treatments.desc: We don't push one trendy solution for everyone. Here's what we offer.
treatments.t1Desc: Softens the hollow groove between eyelid and cheek
treatments.t4Desc: Uses your body's own growth factors
treatments.t6Desc: Pico Laser, Pro Yellow Laser & more

safety.title: Why expertise matters for under-eye treatments
safety.desc: The under-eye area is delicate. Dermal fillers can carry serious risks if injected into a blood vessel, including skin injury and rare vision complications. That's why correct patient selection and experienced injection matter.
safety.point1: Doctor-led aesthetic clinic with consultation-first planning
safety.point3: Tear trough filler requires careful assessment
safety.risk1: Nexus Clinic explicitly warns of serious risks if filler is injected into a blood vessel, including skin injury and rare vision complications.
safety.risk2: Choose a doctor-led clinic and a conservative technique. Your safety is our priority.

faq.q1: What causes dark circles under the eyes?
faq.a1: Common causes include genetics, fatigue, rubbing, skin thinning, pigment changes, and sun exposure.
faq.q2: Can lack of sleep cause dark circles?
faq.a2: Yes, fatigue is a known contributor and can make the under-eye area look darker or more hollow.
faq.a3: They can. Rubbing habits can lead to post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation around the eyes.
faq.q4: Does tear trough filler remove dark circles?
faq.a4: It can reduce the 'dark' look when the problem is shadowing from hollowness, but not for pigmentation.
faq.q5: Can dark circles be removed permanently?
faq.a5: Significant improvement is possible, but 'permanent' depends on the cause.

pricing.title: Investment in your confidence

whyNexus.title: Why Nexus Clinic stands out in Kuala Lumpur
whyNexus.desc: While other clinics focus on devices and menus, we lead with diagnosis-first clarity and under-eye safety. Our doctor-led approach ensures you get the right treatment for your specific cause.

cta.title: Start with a diagnosis-led consultation
cta.desc: We'll identify whether your dark circles are pigment, vessels, hollows, or eye bags, then build a plan that fits your skin and your comfort level.
